snippets.C0621:
' C0621 · FizzBuzz
Function Solve(n)
  Dim i, out : out = ""
  For i = 1 To n
    If i Mod 15 = 0 Then
      out = out & "FizzBuzz"
    ElseIf i Mod 3 = 0 Then
      out = out & "Fizz"
    ElseIf i Mod 5 = 0 Then
      out = out & "Buzz"
    Else
      out = out & CStr(i)
    End If
    If i < n Then out = out & vbCrLf
  Next
  Solve = out
End Function

snippets.D0001:
' D0001 · Crear base de datos (Básico, Base de datos)
' VBScript 5.8 - ADODB
Dim cn : Set cn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
cn.Open "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=demo_db;User Id=USER;Password=PASS;"
cn.Execute "CREATE DATABASE demo_db;"
cn.Close
Set cn = Nothing
snippets.D0002:
' D0002 · Crear tabla (Básico, Base de datos)
' VBScript 5.8 - ADODB
Dim cn : Set cn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
cn.Open "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=demo_db;User Id=USER;Password=PASS;"
cn.Execute "USE demo_db; CREATE TABLE dbo.users (   id INT IDENTITY(1,1) PRIMARY KEY,   name NVARCHAR(200) NOT NULL,   email NVARCHAR(320) NOT NULL,   created_at DATETIME2 NOT NULL DEFAULT SYSDATETIME() );"
cn.Close
Set cn = Nothing
snippets.D0003:
' D0003 · Insertar registro (Básico, Base de datos)
' VBScript 5.8 - ADODB
Dim cn : Set cn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
cn.Open "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=demo_db;User Id=USER;Password=PASS;"
cn.Execute "INSERT INTO dbo.users(name, email) VALUES (N'Ana', N'ana@demo.cl');"
cn.Close
Set cn = Nothing
snippets.D0004:
' D0004 · Actualizar registro (Básico, Base de datos)
' VBScript 5.8 - ADODB
Dim cn : Set cn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
cn.Open "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=demo_db;User Id=USER;Password=PASS;"
cn.Execute "UPDATE dbo.users SET email = N'ana2@demo.cl' WHERE id = 1;"
cn.Close
Set cn = Nothing
snippets.D0005:
' D0005 · Eliminar registro (Básico, Base de datos)
' VBScript 5.8 - ADODB
Dim cn : Set cn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
cn.Open "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=demo_db;User Id=USER;Password=PASS;"
cn.Execute "DELETE FROM dbo.users WHERE id = 1;"
cn.Close
Set cn = Nothing
snippets.D0006:
' D0006 · Seleccionar con filtro (Básico, Base de datos)
' VBScript 5.8 - ADODB
Dim cn : Set cn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
cn.Open "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=demo_db;User Id=USER;Password=PASS;"
cn.Execute "SELECT id, name, email, created_at FROM dbo.users WHERE email LIKE N'%@demo.cl' ORDER BY created_at DESC;"
cn.Close
Set cn = Nothing
snippets.D0007:
' D0007 · Join básico (Intermedio, Base de datos)
' VBScript 5.8 - ADODB
Dim cn : Set cn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
cn.Open "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=demo_db;User Id=USER;Password=PASS;"
cn.Execute "SELECT u.id, u.name, o.id AS order_id, o.total FROM dbo.users u JOIN dbo.orders o ON o.user_id = u.id ORDER BY o.created_at DESC;"
cn.Close
Set cn = Nothing
snippets.D0008:
' D0008 · Crear índice (Básico, Base de datos)
' VBScript 5.8 - ADODB
Dim cn : Set cn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
cn.Open "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=demo_db;User Id=USER;Password=PASS;"
cn.Execute "CREATE UNIQUE INDEX IX_users_email ON dbo.users(email);"
cn.Close
Set cn = Nothing
snippets.D0009:
' D0009 · Transacción (Intermedio, Base de datos)
' VBScript 5.8 - ADODB
Dim cn : Set cn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
cn.Open "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=demo_db;User Id=USER;Password=PASS;"
cn.Execute "BEGIN TRAN;   UPDATE dbo.users SET email = N'x@demo.cl' WHERE id = 1;   -- Si algo falla: ROLLBACK TRAN; COMMIT TRAN;"
cn.Close
Set cn = Nothing
snippets.D0010:
' D0010 · Upsert (Intermedio, Base de datos)
' VBScript 5.8 - ADODB
Dim cn : Set cn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
cn.Open "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=demo_db;User Id=USER;Password=PASS;"
cn.Execute "MERGE dbo.users AS t USING (SELECT N'Ana' AS name, N'ana@demo.cl' AS email) AS s ON t.email = s.email WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.name = s.name WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT(name,email) VALUES(s.name,s.email);"
cn.Close
Set cn = Nothing
snippets.D0011:
' D0011 · Paginación (Básico, Base de datos)
' VBScript 5.8 - ADODB
Dim cn : Set cn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
cn.Open "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=demo_db;User Id=USER;Password=PASS;"
cn.Execute "SELECT id, name, email FROM dbo.users ORDER BY id OFFSET 20 ROWS FETCH NEXT 10 ROWS ONLY;"
cn.Close
Set cn = Nothing
snippets.D0012:
' D0012 · Crear vista (Básico, Base de datos)
' VBScript 5.8 - ADODB
Dim cn : Set cn = CreateObject("ADODB.Connection")
cn.Open "Provider=SQLOLEDB;Data Source=.;Initial Catalog=demo_db;User Id=USER;Password=PASS;"
cn.Execute "CREATE VIEW dbo.v_users AS SELECT id, name, email FROM dbo.users;"
cn.Close
Set cn = Nothing

snippets.C0647:
' C0647 · Generar Excel (XLSX) simple
Dim xl : Set xl = CreateObject("Excel.Application")
xl.Visible = False
Dim wb : Set wb = xl.Workbooks.Add()
Dim ws : Set ws = wb.Worksheets(1)
ws.Cells(1,1).Value = "Nombre"
ws.Cells(1,2).Value = "Email"
ws.Cells(1,3).Value = "Puntos"
ws.Cells(2,1).Value = "Ana":   ws.Cells(2,2).Value = "ana@demo.cl":   ws.Cells(2,3).Value = 10
ws.Cells(3,1).Value = "Beto":  ws.Cells(3,2).Value = "beto@demo.cl":  ws.Cells(3,3).Value = 7
ws.Cells(4,1).Value = "Carla": ws.Cells(4,2).Value = "carla@demo.cl": ws.Cells(4,3).Value = 9
wb.SaveAs "reporte.xlsx"
wb.Close False
xl.Quit
snippets.C0648:
' C0648 · Generar PDF simple
Dim wd : Set wd = CreateObject("Word.Application")
wd.Visible = False
Dim doc : Set doc = wd.Documents.Add()
doc.Content.InsertAfter "Reporte PDF" & vbCrLf & "- Ana - 10" & vbCrLf & "- Beto - 7" & vbCrLf & "- Carla - 9"
doc.ExportAsFixedFormat "reporte.pdf", 17
doc.Close False
wd.Quit
snippets.C0649:
' C0649 · Gráfico de barras simple
Dim xl : Set xl = CreateObject("Excel.Application")
xl.Visible = False
Dim wb : Set wb = xl.Workbooks.Add()
Dim ws : Set ws = wb.Worksheets(1)
ws.Cells(1,1).Value = "Label": ws.Cells(1,2).Value = "Valor"
ws.Cells(2,1).Value = "A": ws.Cells(2,2).Value = 3
ws.Cells(3,1).Value = "B": ws.Cells(3,2).Value = 7
ws.Cells(4,1).Value = "C": ws.Cells(4,2).Value = 5
Dim ch : Set ch = ws.Shapes.AddChart2(201, 51).Chart
ch.SetSourceData ws.Range("A1:B4")
ch.Export "barras.png"
wb.Close False
xl.Quit
